title: My In-Laws Tricked My Dying Husband, Stole Our $300K, Evicted Us. So I Watched Them Go Bankrupt
description: My in-laws tricked my dying husband into signing over our $300,000 startup equity, then evicted me and our newborn. Six years later, I was hired as CFO of the company that acquired their business and I found the fraudulent transfer. I clawed back every cent with interest, leaving them $7.2 million in debt. #RevengeStory #FinancialJustice #Karma
thumb_text: THEY STOLE $300K FROM A WIDOW. SHE BECAME THEIR CFO.

thumb_lines.text: SIX YEARS LATER, SHE BECAME THEIR CFO
